name: Boom and Rum
short_description: "Boom and Rum" is an exciting action-puzzle game with elements of arcade 3D, where players immerse themselves in the world of complex mazes. Your task is to find the exit, overcoming obstacles and using explosives to destroy walls and enemies standing in your way.
detailed_description:
"Boom and Rum" is an exciting action-puzzle game with elements of arcade 3D, where players immerse themselves in the world of complex mazes.
Your task is to find the exit, overcoming obstacles and using explosives to destroy walls and enemies standing in your way.
With each level, the challenges become more difficult and the enemies more dangerous.
Use strategy and quick reflexes to achieve victory and become a master of explosions!

Game features:

3D graphics
Explosive mechanics
Complex mazes
Dynamic gameplay
